debug_info.goal:
case hf.refine_2.right
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : r ≠ 0
h : Meromorphic f
h₂ : 0 < meromorphicOrderAt f 0
this✝¹ : Ioc (2 * Real.pi) 0 = ∅
this✝ : Meromorphic f
this : Measurable f
⊢ MeasureTheory.Integrable
    (fun x => ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖circleMap 0 1 y - f (circleMap 0 r x)‖| ∂MeasureTheory.volume)
    (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))

failed_attempts: exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (by simpa [norm_sub_rev] using ρ₃' h)).mp (by simpa [norm_sub_rev] using ρ₃'' h) |>.2
exact ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' fun z _ ↦ h z)).mp (ρ₃'' fun z _ ↦ h z)).2.2

have h_int := ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z)
        simp_rw [norm_sub_rev, ← Real.norm_eq_abs]
        exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff h_int.aeStronglyMeasurable).mp h_int |>.2
exact ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).1 (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).2.2

have hf : MeromorphicOn f ⊤ := fun z _ ↦ h z
        simpa [norm_sub_rev] using (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' hf)).mp (ρ₃'' hf) .2
exact ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).mp (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).2
exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).mp (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z)) |>.2
exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (by fun_prop)).mp (by simpa [norm_sub_rev] using ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z)).2.2

exact ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (by simp_rw [norm_sub_rev]; exact ρ₃' h)).mp
          (by simp_rw [norm_sub_rev]; exact ρ₃'' h)).2.2
exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' fun z _ ↦ h z)).mp (ρ₃'' fun z _ ↦ h z) |>.2
exact ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).mp (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).2
exact ((MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).mp (ρ₃'' (fun z _ ↦ h z))).2
